name: GIGABYTE B760 DS3H AC ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports DDR5-7600(OC) - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 4x PCIe 3.0 x1 - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen2x2 Type-C - DisplayPort 1.2 - HDMI 2.1 - Gigabit LAN - Intel Wi-Fi 802.11ac - Bluetooth 5.1
shortName: GIGABYTE B760 DS3H AC ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - Supports
description: ATX motherboard for Intel 12th/13th gen with B760 chipset and WiFi 6 support.
